samples.xml_description:
<module id="alu">
    <description>ALU for a 32-bit MIPS-ISA CPU. Supports various arithmetic and logical operations based on the provided opcode (aluc).</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="a" width_description="[31:0]">First operand for the ALU.</input>
        <input id="b" width_description="[31:0]">Second operand for the ALU.</input>
        <input id="aluc" width_description="[5:0]">Control signal specifying the operation to perform.</input>
        <output id="r" width_description="[31:0]">Result of the ALU operation.</output>
        <output id="zero">Indicates if the result is zero.</output>
        <output id="carry">Indicates if there was a carry in the operation.</output>
        <output id="negative">Indicates if the result is negative.</output>
        <output id="overflow">Indicates if there was an overflow in the operation.</output>
        <output id="flag">General flag output, specifically for SLT and SLTU operations.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <constant name="ADD" value="6'b100000">Addition operation.</constant>
        <constant name="ADDU" value="6'b100001">Unsigned addition operation.</constant>
        <constant name="SUB" value="6'b100010">Subtraction operation.</constant>
        <constant name="SUBU" value="6'b100011">Unsigned subtraction operation.</constant>
        <constant name="AND" value="6'b100100">Bitwise AND operation.</constant>
        <constant name="OR" value="6'b100101">Bitwise OR operation.</constant>
        <constant name="XOR" value="6'b100110">Bitwise XOR operation.</constant>
        <constant name="NOR" value="6'b100111">Bitwise NOR operation.</constant>
        <constant name="SLT" value="6'b101010">Set less than operation.</constant>
        <constant name="SLTU" value="6'b101011">Unsigned set less than operation.</constant>
        <constant name="SLL" value="6'b000000">Shift left logical operation.</constant>
        <constant name="SRL" value="6'b000010">Shift right logical operation.</constant>
        <constant name="SRA" value="6'b000011">Shift right arithmetic operation.</constant>
        <constant name="SLLV" value="6'b000100">Shift left variable operation.</constant>
        <constant name="SRLV" value="6'b000110">Shift right variable operation.</constant>
        <constant name="SRAV" value="6'b000111">Shift right variable arithmetic operation.</constant>
        <constant name="LUI" value="6'b001111">Load upper immediate operation.</constant>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        <assign r[31:0] = res[31:0];>
            Assigns the lower 32 bits of the result to the output 'r'.
        </assign>
        <assign flag = (aluc == SLT || aluc == SLTU) ? 1 : z;>
            Sets the 'flag' output to '1' if the operation is SLT or SLTU, otherwise sets it to high impedance ('z').
        </assign>
        <assign zero = ~|res[31:0];>
            Sets the 'zero' output to '1' if all bits of 'res' are zero, otherwise sets it to '0'.
        </assign>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        Always block to determine the result based on the control signal (aluc):
        - Performs addition/subtraction, bitwise operations, shifts, and LUI based on the specified operation.
        - Outputs the result in 'res', handling special cases like overflow and setting flags appropriately.
    </implementation>
</module>
